prompt: Ultra-realistic wellness lifestyle magazine cover featuring a glowing Korean woman in a white linen co-ord matching set, holding a beautifully designed Erewhon-branded adaptogen wellness tonic bottle in both hands at chest level, warm serene smile. Luminous hydrated glass skin, zero-makeup fresh look, natural tinted lip balm. Soft beachy waves. Background: bright California farmers market aesthetic — blurred baskets of fresh produce, warm morning sun streaming through, clean vibrant healthy energy. "VOGUE LIVING" masthead in clean modern serif with "WELLNESS ISSUE" callout. 50mm lens, ultra-detailed bottle label and glass texture, 8K photorealistic wellness lifestyle.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic wellness lifestyle magazine cover featuring a glowing Korean woman in a white linen co-ord matching set, holding a beautifully designed Erewhon-branded adaptogen wellness tonic bottle in both hands at chest level, warm serene smile. Luminous hydrated glass skin, zero-makeup fresh look, natural tinted lip balm. Soft beachy waves. Background: bright California farmers market aesthetic — blurred baskets of fresh produce, warm morning sun streaming through, clean vibrant healthy energy. "VOGUE LIVING" masthead in clean modern serif with "WELLNESS ISSUE" callout. 50mm lens, ultra-detailed bottle label and glass texture, 8K photorealistic wellness lifestyle.
promptZh: 超写实的健康生活方式杂志封面，主角为一位容光焕发的 韩国女性，身着 白色亚麻套装，双手捧着一瓶设计精美的 Erewhon 品牌适应原健康补剂，面带温暖宁静的微笑。肌肤呈现水润透亮的光泽感，妆容清透自然，涂抹着天然润色唇膏。发型为柔和的海滩波浪卷。背景：明亮的加州农贸市场美学——模糊的生鲜蔬果篮，温暖的晨光洒入，充满干净、活力与健康的能量。"VOGUE LIVING" 刊头采用简洁现代的衬线字体，并带有“WELLNESS ISSUE”（健康专刊）的标题标注。50mm 镜头，超细节的瓶身标签和玻璃质感，8K 级健康生活方式摄影。
